productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Grey Stride Sports Shoes
description: Strengthen your running and training sessions without compromising on style in the adidas Stride running shoe. With a responsive formation design and adaptive midfoot support, this makes for a perfect shoe for training and work outs.UpperMesh and synthetic upper for absolute durability, breathability and comfortadidas patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and styleMeshed and padded collar and tongue for enhanced breathable and snug, comfort and FitMeshed and cushioned inner for absolute breathable comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised fitErgonomically curved and padded footbed for all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for an absolutely cushioned ride, lightweight comfort and enhanced impact protectionadiWEAR inserts in the heel for enhanced shock absorption and better heel-strikeOutsoleTPU outsole with flex grooves for ease of movement and enhanced durabilityImpact guidance line for absolute shock absorbencySpeed-grip in the decoupled heel for absolute support when running at high speedShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
